steps.title: Identify the defining pattern
steps.content: The passage opens with a key metaphor: Louis 'tended the petition like a garden.' The rest shows what this means—keeping it with him at all times, sharpening his eyes for unsigned members, cornering them in every circumstance, letting no excuse stop him. This pattern of relentless, unwavering commitment is the passage's focus.

steps.title: Match the pattern to the main purpose
steps.content: Choice C states it directly: Louis's strong commitment to collecting signatures. The other three describe situations the passage doesn't show (changing attitudes, refusals) or shift focus from Louis to the tribe. That matches choice C — C is correct.
